      "source": [

              "\n",
              "    <script>\n",
              "      const buttonEl =\n",
              "        document.querySelector('#df-16e28d9b-a07f-47ed-970b-442c6e60157b button.colab-df-convert');\n",
              "      buttonEl.style.display =\n",

              "\n",
              "      async function convertToInteractive(key) {\n",
              "        const element = document.querySelector('#df-16e28d9b-a07f-47ed-970b-442c6e60157b');\n",
              "        const dataTable =\n",
              "          await google.colab.kernel.invokeFunction('convertToInteractive',\n",
              "                                                    [key], {});\n",
              "        if (!dataTable) return;\n",
              "\n",
              "        const docLinkHtml = 'Like what you see? Visit the ' +\n",
              "          '<a target=\"_blank\" href=https://colab.research.google.com/notebooks/data_table.ipynb>data table notebook</a>'\n",
              "          + ' to learn more about interactive tables.';\n",
              "        element.innerHTML = '';\n",
              "        dataTable['output_type'] = 'display_data';\n",
              "        await google.colab.output.renderOutput(dataTable, element);\n",
              "        const docLink = document.createElement('div');\n",
              "        docLink.innerHTML = docLinkHtml;\n",
              "        element.appendChild(docLink);\n",
              "      }\n",
              "    </script>\n",
              "  </div>\n",
              "\n",

      "source": [
        "\n",
        "df =pd.read_csv(\"prices.csv\", header=0)\n",

              "        const dataTable =\n",

              "          '<a target=\"_blank\" href=https://colab.research.google.com/notebooks/data_table.ipynb>data table notebook</a>'\n",
              "          + ' to learn more about interactive tables.';\n",
              "        element.innerHTML = '';\n",
              "        dataTable['output_type'] = 'display_data';\n",
              "        await google.colab.output.renderOutput(dataTable, element);\n",
              "        const docLink = document.createElement('div');\n",
              "        docLink.innerHTML = docLinkHtml;\n",
              "        element.appendChild(docLink);\n",
              "      }\n",
              "    </script>\n",

              "    <tr>\n",
              "      <th>volume</th>\n",
              "      <td>0</td>\n",
              "    </tr>\n",
              "  </tbody>\n",
              "</table>\n",
              "</div><br><label><b>dtype:</b> int64</label>"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "display (df.isnull().sum())"
      ]
    },

              "      fill: #1967D2;\n",

              "    }\n",
              "\n",

              "      background-color: #E2EBFA;\n",
              "      box-shadow: 0px 1px 2px rgba(60, 64, 67, 0.3), 0px 1px 3px 1px rgba(60, 64, 67, 0.15);\n",
              "      fill: #174EA6;\n",
              "    }\n",
              "\n",
              "    .colab-df-buttons div {\n",
              "      margin-bottom: 4px;\n",
              "    }\n",
              "\n",
              "    [theme=dark] .colab-df-convert {\n",
              "      background-color: #3B4455;\n",
              "      fill: #D2E3FC;\n",
              "    }\n",
              "\n",
              "    [theme=dark] .colab-df-convert:hover {\n",
              "      background-color: #434B5C;\n",
              "      box-shadow: 0px 1px 3px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);\n",
              "      filter: drop-shadow(0px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3));\n",
              "      fill: #FFFFFF;\n",
              "    }\n",
              "  </style>\n",
              "\n",
              "    <script>\n",
              "      const buttonEl =\n",
              "        document.querySelector('#df-ebbb458f-f73f-47f5-8f3d-ba00d33be3ba button.colab-df-convert');\n",
              "      buttonEl.style.display =\n",
              "        google.colab.kernel.accessAllowed ? 'block' : 'none';\n",
              "\n",
              "      async function convertToInteractive(key) {\n",
              "        const element = document.querySelector('#df-ebbb458f-f73f-47f5-8f3d-ba00d33be3ba');\n",
              "        const dataTable =\n",
              "          await google.colab.kernel.invokeFunction('convertToInteractive',\n",
              "                                                    [key], {});\n",
              "        if (!dataTable) return;\n",
              "\n",
              "        const docLinkHtml = 'Like what you see? Visit the ' +\n",
              "          '<a target=\"_blank\" href=https://colab.research.google.com/notebooks/data_table.ipynb>data table notebook</a>'\n",
              "          + ' to learn more about interactive tables.';\n",
              "        element.innerHTML = '';\n",
              "        dataTable['output_type'] = 'display_data';\n",
              "        await google.colab.output.renderOutput(dataTable, element);\n",
              "        const docLink = document.createElement('div');\n",
              "        docLink.innerHTML = docLinkHtml;\n",
              "        element.appendChild(docLink);\n",
              "      }\n",
              "    </script>\n",
              "  </div>\n",
              "\n",
              "\n",
              "    </div>\n",
              "  </div>\n"
            ],
            "application/vnd.google.colaboratory.intrinsic+json": {
              "type": "dataframe",
              "summary": "{\n  \"name\": \"display (pd\",\n  \"rows\": 3524,\n  \"fields\": [\n    {\n      \"column\": 0,\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"string\",\n        \"num_unique_values\": 3524,\n        \"samples\": [\n          \"2010-02-26\",\n          \"2014-02-26 00:00:00\",\n          \"2016-07-25\"\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    }\n  ]\n}"
            }
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "display (pd.DataFrame(df.date.unique()))"
      ]
    },

            "text/plain": [
              "    Ticker symbol                Security SEC filings             GICS Sector  \\\n",
              "0             MMM              3M Company     reports             Industrials   \n",
              "1             ABT     Abbott Laboratories     reports             Health Care   \n",
              "2            ABBV                  AbbVie     reports             Health Care   \n",
              "3             ACN           Accenture plc     reports  Information Technology   \n",
              "4            ATVI     Activision Blizzard     reports  Information Technology   \n",
              "..            ...                     ...         ...                     ...   \n",
              "500          YHOO              Yahoo Inc.     reports  Information Technology   \n",
              "501           YUM         Yum! Brands Inc     reports  Consumer Discretionary   \n",
              "502           ZBH  Zimmer Biomet Holdings     reports             Health Care   \n",
              "503          ZION           Zions Bancorp     reports              Financials   \n",
              "504           ZTS                  Zoetis     reports             Health Care   \n",
              "\n",
              "                  GICS Sub Industry   Address of Headquarters  \\\n",
              "0          Industrial Conglomerates       St. Paul, Minnesota   \n",
              "1             Health Care Equipment   North Chicago, Illinois   \n",
              "2                   Pharmaceuticals   North Chicago, Illinois   \n",
              "3    IT Consulting & Other Services           Dublin, Ireland   \n",
              "4       Home Entertainment Software  Santa Monica, California   \n",
              "..                              ...                       ...   \n",
              "500    Internet Software & Services     Sunnyvale, California   \n",
              "501                     Restaurants      Louisville, Kentucky   \n",
              "502           Health Care Equipment           Warsaw, Indiana   \n",

              "          + ' to learn more about interactive tables.';\n",
              "        element.innerHTML = '';\n",
              "        dataTable['output_type'] = 'display_data';\n",
              "        await google.colab.output.renderOutput(dataTable, element);\n",
              "        const docLink = document.createElement('div');\n",
              "        docLink.innerHTML = docLinkHtml;\n",
              "        element.appendChild(docLink);\n",
              "      }\n",
              "    </script>\n",

              "type": "dataframe",

              "summary": "{\n  \"name\": \"comp_info\",\n  \"rows\": 505,\n  \"fields\": [\n    {\n      \"column\": \"Ticker symbol\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"string\",\n        \"num_unique_values\": 505,\n        \"samples\": [\n          \"ES\",\n          \"LVLT\",\n          \"WFM\"\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"Security\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"string\",\n        \"num_unique_values\": 504,\n        \"samples\": [\n          \"Eversource Energy\",\n          \"Level 3 Communications\",\n          \"Whole Foods Market\"\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"SEC filings\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"category\",\n        \"num_unique_values\": 1,\n        \"samples\": [\n          \"reports\"\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"GICS Sector\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"category\",\n        \"num_unique_values\": 11,\n        \"samples\": [\n          \"Financials\"\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"GICS Sub Industry\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"category\",\n        \"num_unique_values\": 124,\n        \"samples\": [\n          \"Data Processing & Outsourced Services\"\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"Address of Headquarters\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"string\",\n        \"num_unique_values\": 264,\n        \"samples\": [\n          \"Dublin, Ohio\"\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"Date first added\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"date\",\n        \"min\": \"1964-03-31 00:00:00\",\n        \"max\": \"2017-01-05 00:00:00\",\n        \"num_unique_values\": 252,\n        \"samples\": [\n          \"07-09-2007\"\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"CIK\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 514437,\n        \"min\": 1800,\n        \"max\": 1659166,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 500,\n        \"samples\": [\n          79879\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    }\n  ]\n}"
            }
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "comp_info = pd.read_csv('securities.csv')\n",
        "display (comp_info)\n"
      ]
    },

      "source": [
        "display(comp_info.loc[comp_info.Security.str.startswith('Face') , :])"
      ]
    },

              "        document.querySelector('#df-f4746219-50e6-4d94-ab08-a3e647a5f664 button.colab-df-convert');\n",
              "      buttonEl.style.display =\n",
              "        google.colab.kernel.accessAllowed ? 'block' : 'none';\n",
              "\n",
              "      async function convertToInteractive(key) {\n",
              "        const element = document.querySelector('#df-f4746219-50e6-4d94-ab08-a3e647a5f664');\n",
              "        const dataTable =\n",
              "          await google.colab.kernel.invokeFunction('convertToInteractive',\n",
              "                                                    [key], {});\n",
              "        if (!dataTable) return;\n",
              "\n",
              "        const docLinkHtml = 'Like what you see? Visit the ' +\n",
              "          '<a target=\"_blank\" href=https://colab.research.google.com/notebooks/data_table.ipynb>data table notebook</a>'\n",
              "          + ' to learn more about interactive tables.';\n",
              "        element.innerHTML = '';\n",
              "        dataTable['output_type'] = 'display_data';\n",
              "        await google.colab.output.renderOutput(dataTable, element);\n",
              "        const docLink = document.createElement('div');\n",
              "        docLink.innerHTML = docLinkHtml;\n",
              "        element.appendChild(docLink);\n",
              "      }\n",
              "    </script>\n",
              "  </div>\n",
              "\n",
              "\n",
              "    </div>\n",
              "  </div>\n"
            ],
            "application/vnd.google.colaboratory.intrinsic+json": {
              "type": "dataframe",
              "repr_error": "0"
            }
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "display (comp_info.loc[comp_info.Security.str.startswith('Acc') , :])"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 333,
      "id": "6f6d3e6c-f1fb-4e02-8ca2-28421cc6c96a",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "6f6d3e6c-f1fb-4e02-8ca2-28421cc6c96a",
        "outputId": "dc3d2631-ed56-412e-f3ad-17e8fc0fe4c7"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "6      ADBE\n",
            "181      FB\n",
            "212      GS\n",
            "306    MSFT\n",
            "496     XRX\n",
            "500    YHOO\n",
            "Name: Ticker symbol, dtype: object\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "comp_plot = comp_info.loc[(comp_info[\"Security\"] == 'Yahoo Inc.') | (comp_info[\"Security\"] == 'Xerox Corp.') | (comp_info[\"Security\"] == 'Adobe Systems Inc')\n",
        "              | (comp_info[\"Security\"] == 'Microsoft Corp.') | (comp_info[\"Security\"] == 'Adobe Systems Inc')\n",
        "              | (comp_info[\"Security\"] == 'Facebook') | (comp_info[\"Security\"] == 'Goldman Sachs Group') , [\"Ticker symbol\"] ][\"Ticker symbol\"]\n",
        "print(comp_plot)\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 334,
      "id": "86732437-7b5f-4cac-bb31-70db5936a624",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "86732437-7b5f-4cac-bb31-70db5936a624",
        "outputId": "76fbfe04-1a01-41e1-96e3-790d31fed2f0"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "ADBE\n",
            "FB\n",
            "GS\n",
            "MSFT\n",
            "XRX\n",
            "YHOO\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "for i in comp_plot:\n",
        "    print (i)\n",
        "\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 335,
      "id": "f1a4b428-55a3-4dc8-9475-ddd71d0a728d",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "f1a4b428-55a3-4dc8-9475-ddd71d0a728d"
      },
      "outputs": [],
      "source": [
        "def plotter(code):\n",
        "    global closing_stock, opening_stock\n",
        "    f, axs = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(15, 8))\n",
        "    plt.subplot(212)\n",
        "    company = df[df['symbol'] == code]\n",
        "    company = company.open.values.astype('float32')\n",
        "    company = company.reshape(-1, 1)\n",
        "    opening_stock = company\n",
        "    plt.grid(True)\n",
        "    plt.xlabel('Time')\n",
        "    plt.ylabel(code + \" open stock prices\")\n",
        "    plt.title('Prices Vs Time')\n",
        "    plt.plot(company, 'g')\n",
        "    plt.subplot(211)\n",
        "    company_close = df[df['symbol'] == code]\n",
        "    company_close = company_close.close.values.astype('float32')\n",
        "    company_close = company_close.reshape(-1, 1)\n",
        "    closing_stock = company_close\n",
        "    plt.xlabel('Time')\n",
        "    plt.ylabel(code + \" close stock prices\")\n",
        "    plt.title('Prices Vs Time')\n",
        "    plt.grid(True)\n",
        "    plt.plot(company_close, 'b')\n",
        "    plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "    plt.show()"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 336,
      "id": "33aaa450-bc54-4495-9322-9cc8f2c6d6e9",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 1000
        },
        "id": "33aaa450-bc54-4495-9322-9cc8f2c6d6e9",
        "outputId": "ff5bf89d-2f55-4ef5-d1b6-a988a6e835ae"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1500x800 with 6 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1500x800 with 6 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1500x800 with 6 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1500x800 with 6 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1500x800 with 6 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1500x800 with 6 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "for i in comp_plot:\n",
        "    plotter(i)\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 337,
      "id": "ef0feebc-63e2-424d-8982-398f19bacf4c",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "ef0feebc-63e2-424d-8982-398f19bacf4c",
        "outputId": "c09d6aaf-77c7-45da-b944-993ebe7052cd"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "[17.1      17.23     17.17     ... 38.73     38.639999 38.669998]\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "stocks= np.array (df[df.symbol.isin (['YHOO'])].close)\n",
        "print(stocks)\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 338,
      "id": "caf74531-9a27-4e94-a1bf-123573b3b99e",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 34
        },
        "id": "caf74531-9a27-4e94-a1bf-123573b3b99e",
        "outputId": "5a126646-0ac1-4d6a-d09e-b6a944eb51ef"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "(1762,)"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "display (stocks.shape)"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 339,
      "id": "a55d4b6c-f275-40a3-9ca5-2461ccba4d7c",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "a55d4b6c-f275-40a3-9ca5-2461ccba4d7c",
        "outputId": "aa820628-530c-4f45-c575-b4aac0e4575f"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "(1762, 1)\n",
            "[[17.1     ]\n",
            " [17.23    ]\n",
            " [17.17    ]\n",
            " ...\n",
            " [38.73    ]\n",
            " [38.639999]\n",
            " [38.669998]]\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "stocks = stocks.reshape(len(stocks) , 1)\n",
        "print (stocks.shape)\n",
        "print(stocks)\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 340,
      "id": "e8f58c20-9851-4745-8ce7-f6b264524aca",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 139
        },
        "id": "e8f58c20-9851-4745-8ce7-f6b264524aca",
        "outputId": "3617cbc8-ba8f-42f4-c8d5-560789da0fc0"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "array([[0.14559109],\n",
              "       [0.14874031],\n",
              "       [0.14728683],\n",
              "       ...,\n",
              "       [0.66957366],\n",
              "       [0.6673934 ],\n",
              "       [0.66812012]])"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "from sklearn.preprocessing import MinMaxScaler\n",
        "scaler = MinMaxScaler(feature_range=(0, 1))\n",
        "stocks = scaler.fit_transform(stocks)\n",
        "display (stocks)\n",
        "\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 341,
      "id": "e6235d60-0fd0-4e4b-adbc-0461b9653254",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "e6235d60-0fd0-4e4b-adbc-0461b9653254",
        "outputId": "2435f572-44ea-41b7-c996-0f880c33d620"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "(1762, 1)\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "print (stocks.shape)"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 342,
      "id": "12ba968a-6930-4818-adba-e96f766bf6e5",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "12ba968a-6930-4818-adba-e96f766bf6e5",
        "outputId": "49b4c89a-a60d-4b96-d85e-74d2c1b6f2a7"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "1409\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "train = int(len(stocks) * 0.80)\n",
        "print (train)\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 343,
      "id": "391c158c-5b0b-48e5-abec-dc7e259f118e",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "391c158c-5b0b-48e5-abec-dc7e259f118e",
        "outputId": "064207d7-aac2-498a-e080-85a25a7d32f9"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "353\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "test = len(stocks) - train\n",
        "print (test)\n",
        "\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 344,
      "id": "13125627-e8be-4a5c-8afa-3f86fa7b788a",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 156
        },
        "id": "13125627-e8be-4a5c-8afa-3f86fa7b788a",
        "outputId": "caa25fa7-fb72-47d9-ecb6-ddca38b178a5"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "(1409, 1)"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        },
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "[[0.14559109]\n",
            " [0.14874031]\n",
            " [0.14728683]\n",
            " ...\n",
            " [0.63372095]\n",
            " [0.61458332]\n",
            " [0.61967051]]\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "train = stocks[0:train]\n",
        "display (train.shape)\n",
        "print(train)\n",
        "\n"
      ]
    },

          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "test = stocks[len(train) : ]\n",
        "display(test.shape)\n",
        "display (test)\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "8b448271",
        "outputId": "91993dc8-fb9f-484d-8110-9c0ed246e087"
      },
      "source": [
        "trainX, trainY = process_data(train, n_features)\n",
        "print (trainX.shape , trainY.shape)"
      ],
      "id": "8b448271",
      "execution_count": 346,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "(1407, 2) (1407,)\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 347,
      "id": "2835ebe4-179d-4552-96de-ab6e03558022",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "2835ebe4-179d-4552-96de-ab6e03558022"
      },
      "outputs": [],
      "source": [
        "def process_data(data , n_features):\n",
        "    dataX, dataY = [], []\n",
        "    for i in range(len(data)-n_features):\n",
        "\n",
        "        a = data[i:(i+n_features), 0]\n",
        "\n",
        "        dataX.append(a)\n",
        "\n",
        "        dataY.append(data[i + n_features, 0])\n",
        "\n",
        "    return np.array(dataX), np.array(dataY)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 348,
      "id": "f5902f74-1e3f-4d21-b82c-ae5dda46da88",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "f5902f74-1e3f-4d21-b82c-ae5dda46da88",
        "outputId": "68e8044e-43ac-435c-f307-81cbc3588422"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "(351, 2) (351,)\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "n_features = 2\n",
        "testX, testY = process_data(test, n_features)\n",
        "print (testX.shape , testY.shape)\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 349,
      "id": "61e21a13-1946-419d-85a6-4445c1ae6060",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "61e21a13-1946-419d-85a6-4445c1ae6060",
        "outputId": "27b3333b-61e0-47d7-a8e1-dee523f72d8a"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "(1760, 2) (1760,)\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "n_features = 2\n",
        "stocksX, stocksY = process_data(stocks, n_features)\n",
        "print (stocksX.shape , stocksY.shape)\n"
      ]
    },

      "cell_type": "code",

              "(1407, 1, 2)"
            ]

        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "if len(trainX.shape) == 2:\n",
        "    trainX = trainX.reshape(trainX.shape[0] , 1 ,trainX.shape[1])\n",
        "display (trainX.shape)"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",

      ],

    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",

      "id": "6d42e3db-c4b1-4d47-bf27-a2b0bbca77ac",

        "id": "6d42e3db-c4b1-4d47-bf27-a2b0bbca77ac",

      },

              "(351, 1, 2)"
            ]
          },

        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "if len(testX.shape) == 2:\n",
        "    testX = testX.reshape(testX.shape[0] , 1 ,testX.shape[1])\n",
        "display (testX.shape)"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 357,
      "id": "f6b476ff-0842-4a60-8182-f51bfc24c716",
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 34
        },
        "id": "f6b476ff-0842-4a60-8182-f51bfc24c716",
        "outputId": "2b2d347e-fbea-4224-9b99-68064efc3f18"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "(1760, 1, 2)"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "if len(stocksX.shape) == 2:\n",
        "    stocksX= stocksX.reshape(stocksX.shape[0] , 1 ,stocksX.shape[1])\n",
        "display (stocksX.shape)"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 358,
      "id": "590b2478-4c34-4006-a34f-4db16d9dc8e1",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "590b2478-4c34-4006-a34f-4db16d9dc8e1"
      },
      "outputs": [],
      "source": [
        "model.add(Dropout(0.4))"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 359,
      "id": "0d9e6b3c-6f35-45bb-b05b-af523ab581fe",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "0d9e6b3c-6f35-45bb-b05b-af523ab581fe"
      },
      "outputs": [],
      "source": [
        "import math\n",
        "from keras.models import Sequential\n",
        "from keras.layers import Dense , BatchNormalization , Dropout , Activation\n",
        "from keras.layers import LSTM , GRU\n",
        "from sklearn.preprocessing import MinMaxScaler\n",
        "from sklearn.metrics import mean_squared_error\n",
        "from keras.optimizers import Adam , SGD , RMSprop"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "filepath=\"stock_weights1.keras\"\n",
        "from keras.callbacks import ReduceLROnPlateau , ModelCheckpoint\n",
        "lr_reduce = ReduceLROnPlateau(monitor='val_loss', factor=0.1, min_delta =0.0001, patience=1, verbose=1)\n",
        "checkpoint = ModelCheckpoint(filepath, monitor='val_loss', verbose=1, save_best_only=True, mode='max')"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "W9ceoqUtsMSP"
      },
      "id": "W9ceoqUtsMSP",
      "execution_count": 360,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "model = Sequential()\n",
        "model.add(GRU(256 , input_shape = (1 , n_features) , return_sequences=True))\n",
        "model.add(Dropout(0.4))\n",
        "model.add(LSTM(256))\n",
        "model.add(Dropout(0.4))\n",
        "model.add(Dense(64 ,  activation = 'relu'))\n",
        "model.add(Dense(1))\n",
        "print(model.summary())"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 348
        },
        "id": "c8hvBHaKuC7y",
        "outputId": "b363e59b-c02c-4186-cca7-079f72a2b39b"
      },
      "id": "c8hvBHaKuC7y",
      "execution_count": 361,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "\u001b[1mModel: \"sequential_8\"\u001b[0m\n"
            ],
            "text/html": [
              "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"font-weight: bold\">Model: \"sequential_8\"</span>\n",
              "</pre>\n"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓\n",
              "┃\u001b[1m \u001b[0m\u001b[1mLayer (type)                   \u001b[0m\u001b[1m \u001b[0m┃\u001b[1m \u001b[0m\u001b[1mOutput Shape          \u001b[0m\u001b[1m \u001b[0m┃\u001b[1m \u001b[0m\u001b[1m      Param #\u001b[0m\u001b[1m \u001b[0m┃\n",
              "┡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┩\n",
              "│ gru_9 (\u001b[38;5;33mGRU\u001b[0m)                     │ (\u001b[38;5;45mNone\u001b[0m, \u001b[38;5;34m1\u001b[0m, \u001b[38;5;34m256\u001b[0m)         │       \u001b[38;5;34m199,680\u001b[0m │\n",
              "├─────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────┼───────────────┤\n",
              "│ dropout_16 (\u001b[38;5;33mDropout\u001b[0m)            │ (\u001b[38;5;45mNone\u001b[0m, \u001b[38;5;34m1\u001b[0m, \u001b[38;5;34m256\u001b[0m)         │             \u001b[38;5;34m0\u001b[0m │\n",
              "├─────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────┼───────────────┤\n",
              "│ lstm_7 (\u001b[38;5;33mLSTM\u001b[0m)                   │ (\u001b[38;5;45mNone\u001b[0m, \u001b[38;5;34m256\u001b[0m)            │       \u001b[38;5;34m525,312\u001b[0m │\n",
              "├─────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────┼───────────────┤\n",
              "│ dropout_17 (\u001b[38;5;33mDropout\u001b[0m)            │ (\u001b[38;5;45mNone\u001b[0m, \u001b[38;5;34m256\u001b[0m)            │             \u001b[38;5;34m0\u001b[0m │\n",
              "├─────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────┼───────────────┤\n",
              "│ dense_12 (\u001b[38;5;33mDense\u001b[0m)                │ (\u001b[38;5;45mNone\u001b[0m, \u001b[38;5;34m64\u001b[0m)             │        \u001b[38;5;34m16,448\u001b[0m │\n",
              "├─────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────┼───────────────┤\n",
              "│ dense_13 (\u001b[38;5;33mDense\u001b[0m)                │ (\u001b[38;5;45mNone\u001b[0m, \u001b[38;5;34m1\u001b[0m)              │            \u001b[38;5;34m65\u001b[0m │\n",
              "└─────────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────┴───────────────┘\n"
            ],
            "text/html": [
              "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\">┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓\n",
              "┃<span style=\"font-weight: bold\"> Layer (type)                    </span>┃<span style=\"font-weight: bold\"> Output Shape           </span>┃<span style=\"font-weight: bold\">       Param # </span>┃\n",
              "┡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┩\n",
              "│ gru_9 (<span style=\"color: #0087ff; text-decoration-color: #0087ff\">GRU</span>)                     │ (<span style=\"color: #00d7ff; text-decoration-color: #00d7ff\">None</span>, <span style=\"color: #00af00; text-decoration-color: #00af00\">1</span>, <span style=\"color: #00af00; text-decoration-color: #00af00\">256</span>)         │       <span style=\"color: #00af00; text-decoration-color: #00af00\">199,680</span> │\n",
              "├─────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────┼───────────────┤\n",

              "├─────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────┼───────────────┤\n",

              "├─────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────┼───────────────┤\n",

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "model.compile(loss='mean_squared_error', optimizer=Adam(0.0005), metrics=['mean_squared_error'])"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "Mxh4JLrTt0rB"
      },
      "id": "Mxh4JLrTt0rB",
      "execution_count": 362,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "history = model.fit(trainX, trainY, epochs=100, batch_size=128, callbacks=[checkpoint, lr_reduce], validation_data=(testX, testY))"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "vcZXLJJyueHB",
        "outputId": "1b4cca34-a3ca-4a3e-9982-e1353654ddb3"
      },

            "\u001b[1m11/11\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m0s\u001b[0m 47ms/step - loss: 0.0055 - mean_squared_error: 0.0055\n",
            "Epoch 85: val_loss did not improve from 0.16854\n",
            "\u001b[1m11/11\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m1s\u001b[0m 61ms/step - loss: 0.0056 - mean_squared_error: 0.0056 - val_loss: 0.0058 - val_mean_squared_error: 0.0058 - learning_rate: 0.0000e+00\n",
            "Epoch 86/100\n",

        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "test_pred = model.predict(testX)\n",
        "display (test_pred [:10])\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 208
        },
        "id": "wdJgAHf2t0uo",

          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",

          ]
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",

              "array([[0.54426056],\n",

    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "test_pred = scaler.inverse_transform(test_pred)\n",
        "display (test_pred [:10])\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 191
        },
        "id": "vGZ5yHtzulFg",

      },
      "id": "vGZ5yHtzulFg",
      "execution_count": 365,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "array([[33.557076],\n",
              "       [32.5003  ],\n",
              "       [32.513195],\n",
              "       [33.18314 ],\n",
              "       [33.24236 ],\n",
              "       [33.02052 ],\n",
              "       [32.660263],\n",
              "       [32.024723],\n",
              "       [31.137976],\n",
              "       [30.042578]], dtype=float32)"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "testY = testY.reshape(testY.shape[0] , 1)\n",
        "testY = scaler.inverse_transform(testY)\n",
        "display (testY[:10])"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 191
        },
        "id": "5KG_iUhCt0yK",
        "outputId": "642a51bc-0ccd-4723-8705-4f2199a388e4"
      },
      "id": "5KG_iUhCt0yK",
      "execution_count": 366,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "array([[34.490002],\n",
              "       [35.93    ],\n",
              "       [36.240002],\n",
              "       [36.099998],\n",
              "       [35.689999],\n",
              "       [35.189999],\n",
              "       [34.099998],\n",
              "       [32.93    ],\n",
              "       [31.309999],\n",
              "       [31.74    ]])"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "from sklearn.metrics import r2_score\n",
        "print (r2_score(testY,test_pred))\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "QIuwfqkNt01w",
        "outputId": "17ed7864-93b3-4f66-a2e6-e540aacd267f"
      },
      "id": "QIuwfqkNt01w",
      "execution_count": 367,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "0.4892937057118836\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "print(\"Red - Predicted Stock Prices  ,  Blue - Actual Stock Prices\")\n",
        "plt.rcParams[\"figure.figsize\"] = (15,7)\n",
        "plt.plot(testY , 'b')\n",
        "plt.plot(test_pred , 'r')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Time')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Stock Prices')\n",
        "plt.title('Check the accuracy of the model with time')\n",
        "plt.grid(True)\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 405
        },
        "id": "V4rvlZ2ou3xG",
        "outputId": "d7851edb-61fd-442b-83b2-6a3ef7af219e"
      },
      "id": "V4rvlZ2ou3xG",
      "execution_count": 368,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Red - Predicted Stock Prices  ,  Blue - Actual Stock Prices\n"
          ]
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1500x700 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "train_pred = model.predict(trainX)\n",
        "train_pred = scaler.inverse_transform(train_pred)\n",
        "trainY = trainY.reshape(trainY.shape[0] , 1)\n",
        "trainY = scaler.inverse_transform(trainY)\n",
        "print ('Display Accuracy Training Data')\n",
        "display (r2_score(trainY,train_pred))\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 69
        },
        "id": "ee6UJExTu3th",
        "outputId": "51f2e3fd-820a-4906-f523-51fc927b824a"
      },
      "id": "ee6UJExTu3th",
      "execution_count": 369,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "\u001b[1m44/44\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m0s\u001b[0m 4ms/step\n",
            "Display Accuracy Training Data\n"
          ]
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "0.9431495717068508"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "print(\"Red - Predicted Stock Prices  ,  Blue - Actual Stock Prices\")\n",
        "plt.rcParams[\"figure.figsize\"] = (15,7)\n",
        "plt.plot(trainY  , 'b')\n",
        "plt.plot(train_pred, 'r')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Time')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Stock Prices')\n",
        "plt.title('Check the accuracy of the model with time')\n",
        "plt.grid(True)\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 409
        },
        "id": "bMsXzWaJu3j0",
        "outputId": "65d4e079-adea-4f6c-bee0-181bd53cb28d"
      },
      "id": "bMsXzWaJu3j0",
      "execution_count": 370,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Red - Predicted Stock Prices  ,  Blue - Actual Stock Prices\n"
          ]
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1500x700 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "stocks_pred = model.predict(stocksX)\n",
        "stocks_pred = scaler.inverse_transform(stocks_pred)\n",
        "stocksY = stocksY.reshape(stocksY.shape[0] , 1)\n",
        "stocksY = scaler.inverse_transform(stocksY)\n",
        "print ('Display Accuracy Training Data')\n",
        "display (r2_score(stocksY,stocks_pred))\n",
        "\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 69
        },
        "id": "nOeawWSFu3gR",
        "outputId": "1964f5e9-5135-4255-885d-422b5e8ae93f"
      },
      "id": "nOeawWSFu3gR",
      "execution_count": 371,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "\u001b[1m55/55\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m0s\u001b[0m 4ms/step\n",
            "Display Accuracy Training Data\n"
          ]
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "0.9384532259951588"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "plt.rcParams[\"figure.figsize\"] = (15,7)\n",
        "plt.plot(stocksY  , 'b')\n",
        "plt.plot(stocks_pred, 'r')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Time')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Stock Prices')\n",
        "plt.title('Check the accuracy of the model with time')\n",
        "plt.grid(True)\n",
        "plt.show()\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 392
        },
        "id": "BpS4zlpRu3cj",
        "outputId": "975556bf-fee4-46dd-c40e-7eceb0c65bbc"
      },
      "id": "BpS4zlpRu3cj",
      "execution_count": 372,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1500x700 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "results= df[df.symbol.isin (['YHOO'])]\n",
        "results= results [2:]\n",
        "results = results.reset_index(drop=True)\n",
        "df_stocks_pred= pd.DataFrame(stocks_pred, columns = ['Close_Prediction'])\n",
        "results= pd.concat([results,df_stocks_pred],axis =1)\n",
        "results.to_csv('results.csv')\n",
        "display(results)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 617
        },
        "id": "tkmFUCHsu3NY",
        "outputId": "bbdcb1be-5fba-4377-c878-3979aaf6c5e8"
      },

      "provenance": [],
      "include_colab_link": true
    }
  },
  "nbformat": 4,
  "nbformat_minor": 5
}
